CREATE TABLE test_alpha (pdec DOUBLE, pradius DOUBLE);
SELECT sys.alpha(pdec, pradius) AS alpha_value FROM test_alpha;
SELECT sys.alpha(pdec, pradius) AS alpha_value FROM test_alpha WHERE pdec > 0;
SELECT pdec, sys.alpha(pdec, pradius) FROM test_alpha WHERE pradius BETWEEN 0 AND 5;
SELECT pdec, sys.alpha(pdec, pradius) FROM test_alpha WHERE pdec IN (SELECT pdec FROM test_alpha WHERE pradius <= 1.0);
CREATE TABLE additional_data (id INT, pdec DOUBLE, pradius DOUBLE);
SELECT a.pdec, sys.alpha(a.pdec, a.pradius) FROM test_alpha a JOIN additional_data b ON a.pdec = b.pdec WHERE b.id = 1;
SELECT AVG(sys.alpha(pdec, pradius)) FROM additional_data GROUP BY pradius HAVING AVG(pradius) > 1;
SELECT DISTINCT sys.alpha(t1.pdec, t1.pradius) FROM test_alpha AS t1 JOIN additional_data AS t2 ON t1.pdec = t2.pdec WHERE t1.pradius <> t2.pradius;
